title: Dumb ahh pumpkin
body:
# It's just a dumb PUMPKIN texture pack :)

It's just a texture pack that change the face of the Carved Pumpkin with a funny face

If you want to see how it's look like go in [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dumb-ahh-pumpkin/gallery)

you won't find a better texture pack than that one

![PUMPKIN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5a1acc032fc97382ba83a42a6eb0c3eb756398.png)
